$comment: Swarm & Bee · The organic dataset bakery · public menu manifest. Every SKU has a real name, real pair count, and real provenance. No round-number lies. See https://bakery.swarmandbee.ai for the human-readable surface.

bakery.name: Swarm & Bee · CCIR · Commercial Compute Intelligence Refinery
bakery.doctrine: AI is a bakery first. Signal is supply. Curators are bakers. Distribution is delivery. Fresh every day, with a shelf life. 500 fantastic muffins crush 25,000 ingredients. Compassionate intelligence — organic datasets with real-world purpose.
bakery.naming_doctrine: Every dataset gets a real bakery name and a real cell count. We never round and we never aggregate two unrelated corpora under one SKU. If a pull is 5,948 pairs, the menu says 5,948 — not 'about 6k'.

by_the_pound.description: Named, graded, deduped medical corpora. Sold per 1,000 cells. Pricing is invoiced (Stripe) or settled to swarmusdc.eth — no auto-checkout. A human reads every order.
by_the_pound.pricing_model: quote on intake — typically $/1k cells, adjusted for tier and rarity
by_the_pound.delivery: tarball + manifest.json + per-cell sha256 + optional Hedera anchor

stock.name: Dmack's Royal Jelly

two_stream_architecture.lived_voice: Founder lived-experience register — never used as medical authority

stock.note: The dmack.ai v1 flagship. Rolled-up master across endo, CGM, PubMed Central, OpenAlex 5-round scholar pull, international guidelines, US government health agencies, hand-curated patterns, and compliance refusal. Senior-hack canary-then-cook review staged. Early-access pricing on intake.

stock.name: Endo Eclair
stock.note: Endocrinology specialty pull from MASTER_PLATINUM — diabetes, hyperglycemia, CGM, management. The pure-endo cell, filled.

stock.name: Cinnamon Spiral
stock.source_attribution: PhysioNet CGMacros (continuous glucose monitor + meal macros, real-world)
stock.note: Continuous + spiral · CGM timeseries paired with meal-macros. The rare real-world physiological cell — not from a textbook, from real patients eating real food.

stock.name: Madeleine
stock.source_attribution: PubMed Central — diabetic retinopathy, neuropathy, foot ulcer, type 1/2, gestational, hypoglycemia
stock.note: The literature cookie. Research-paper-grade Q/A derived from PubMed Central full-texts on diabetes complications. Citation-anchored.

stock.name: Scholar Croissant
stock.note: Layered like a croissant — five rounds of OpenAlex scholarly extraction across diabetes adjacencies (cardiometabolic, adipokines, microbiota, thyroid, circadian). 250M+ paper corpus, ~52K pairs distilled.

stock.name: Global Crumpet
stock.source_attribution: NHS, IDF, WHO, DiabetesUK, HealthDirect AU, NICE
stock.note: International clinical guidelines — the regulatory crumpet. UK NHS, International Diabetes Federation, WHO, NICE guidance.

stock.name: Federal Glaze
stock.note: US federal-source diabetes, CVD, nutrition, endocrine. Government polish, full sheen.
use_cases: patient-facing health education at federal-source register

stock.name: Founder's Pretzel
stock.note: Hand-twisted patterns. Founder-curated clinical-reasoning insights from 30 years of lived experience and 14 foot surgeries. The rarest cell on the shelf — register only, never medical authority.

stock.name: Compliance Cookie
stock.note: Bite-sized. The brake pedal. Compliance refusal training — when not to answer, when to escalate, when to defer to a clinician.

stock.name: Royal Jelly Brioche
stock.note: The crown brioche — multimodal clinical imaging vignettes (MRI sagittal/axial, imaging findings → diagnostic reasoning). Heavy on MSK / neuro / spine. NOT diabetes-specific; broader radiological reasoning corpus.

stock.name: Golden Glaze
stock.note: Spine + neuro imaging at gold tier. Companion to the Royal Jelly Brioche.

stock.name: Atlas Sourdough
stock.note: The original Atlas-class CRE corpus — the foundation loaf, baked over years. Maintained as proof-of-process. The bakery's medical pivot does not retire this; it stays available for shops who need CRE breadth.

in_development: Autoimmune Tarte · Hashimoto / Lupus / RA expansion
by_the_pound.audit_method: Direct filesystem inventory of ~/Desktop/dmack-ai/corpus/ + /mnt/swarm/dmack-ai/ + /mnt/swarm/swarm-and-bee-datasets/medical/. wc -l on every jsonl. No estimates.

the_500_pack.description: 500-1,000 pairs hand-built around one failure mode. Each pair carries failure_source + repair_goal metadata. Tribunal-sealed before delivery. 25-50× the leverage of equivalent wholesale.
the_500_pack.pricing_model: fixed-price per pack — scoped on intake, invoiced via Stripe or settled to swarmusdc.eth
the_500_pack.delivery: JSONL corpus + scoping memo + Tribunal seal + sha256 manifest + optional cook-for-you on owned Blackwell silicon

starter_kits.name: Diabetic Foot Sablé · 500
starter_kits.description: 500 pairs targeting IWGDF-aligned diabetic foot-ulcer assessment, infection grading, offloading prescription, escalation timing. Founder lived-experience reviewed; medical authority sourced.

starter_kits.name: Glycemic Reasoning Galette · 500
starter_kits.description: 500 pairs targeting carb-ratio, correction-factor, basal-bolus reasoning. Refusal pattern when inputs are insufficient (the medical-grade fabrication firewall).

starter_kits.name: Patient Comm Brioche · 500
starter_kits.description: 500 pairs targeting medical-jargon-to-plain-language rewrite, consent explanation, triage script generation.

starter_kits.name: Fabrication-Detection Pretzel · 500
starter_kits.description: 500 pairs targeting fabrication detection at honey-grade confidence. Trains a model to flag confident hallucinations, not just hedge.

starter_kits.name: Math-Verification Macaron · 500
starter_kits.description: 500 pairs targeting numeric claim verification. Refusal patterns when inputs are insufficient.

sample_packs.description: Free taste tests. Same provenance shape as a full delivery — see the quality bar before you order. Each pack includes at least one PROPOLIS-grade pair (labeled) so you see what we filter out.

ordering.channel_doctrine: Datasets are available ONLY through the CLI. Browse the menu, pick a SKU by name, submit an order. We invoice you (Stripe) or send a settlement address (swarmusdc.eth). No auto-checkout, no card-on-file, no instant download. A human reads every order within one business day.
ordering.cli_order_example: swarmbee-bakery order --sku by-the-pound --domain medical --name 'Your Name' --email 'you@you.dev' --notes 'I want Dmack Royal Jelly · 5 lb'

settlement_rails.stripe_invoice: Human mints a Stripe invoice and emails the link. No card kept on file.
settlement_rails.swarmusdc: Settle to swarmusdc.eth (resolves to 0xBDe2153C…). USDC on Ethereum L1 by default; L2 available on request.

provenance.medical_two_stream: Every medical pair separates sourced authority (ADA, Endocrine Society, IWGDF, NIDDK, NIH, NHS, IDF, WHO, CDC, NICE) from lived-experience register. Lived voice is never used as medical authority.
provenance.no_round_numbers_doctrine: If the menu says 77,797 cells it means exactly 77,797 cells — counted by wc -l, not estimated. Round numbers are a tell that the seller doesn't know what they're selling.
provenance.certification: Outputs trained on Swarm & Bee corpora may carry the defendable.eth mark. See https://defendable.eth.limo
